{{/* Renders one schema field as a modern .api-field block. Parameters: key – field name contents – the OpenAPI schema node for this field page – page context ($) kind – hyphenated ancestor path used to build unique element IDs required – bool */}} {{ $elemID := printf "%s-%s" .kind .key }} {{ $fields := partial "apiBuilder/getSpecFields" .contents }} {{ $isEnum := partial "apiBuilder/isEnum" .contents }} {{ $props := $fields.properties }} {{ $desc := $fields.description }} {{ $default := index .contents "default" }} {{ if $props }} {{/* ── Expandable field (object / []object) ───────────────────────────── */}}
{{ if or $desc $default }}
{{ with $desc }}

{{ . | markdownify }}

{{ end }} {{ with $default }}

default: {{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ $req := $fields.required }} {{ range $innerKey, $innerVal := $props }} {{ partial "apiBuilder/processSpec" (dict "key" $innerKey "contents" $innerVal "page" .page "kind" $elemID "required" (in $req $innerKey) ) }} {{ end }}
{{ else }} {{/* ── Leaf field ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}}
{{ .key }} {{ if $isEnum }} {{ partial "apiBuilder/enumHandler" .contents }} {{ else }} {{ $fields.dataType }} {{ end }} {{ if .required }} required {{ else }} optional {{ end }}
{{ if or $desc $default }}
{{ with $desc }}

{{ . | markdownify }}

{{ end }} {{ with $default }}

default: {{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }}
